---
title: "MaAsLin3_16S_Analysis"
author: "Zhongzhi"
date: "2026-04-09"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```



### 16S Taxa Units MaSaLin3 Analysis
```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
setwd("C:/Users/dlszz/OneDrive - Dalhousie University/Nursing_House_Project/Git_Project/northwood-microbiome/code/MG_analysis")

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(maaslin3)

### Read in 16S ASV feature table
data_table_name <- file.path("../../tmp_figures/16S_MaAsLin3_data", "table_bleed_decon.tsv")

org_data_table <- read.csv(data_table_name, sep = '\t', row.names = 1, skip = 1, check.names = FALSE)
nrow(org_data_table)
org_data_table[1:5, 1:5]
nrow(org_data_table)
ncol(org_data_table)

# # Remove Duplicate Samples and Sample without metadata
# data_table <- org_data_table[, !colnames(org_data_table) %in% c("NW046-1", "NW046-5")]
data_table <- org_data_table
data_table[1:5, 1:5]
nrow(data_table)
ncol(data_table)



### Read in ASV taxonomic mappings
taxa_map_name <- file.path("../../tmp_figures/16S_MaAsLin3_data", "taxonomy.tsv")
taxa_map_table <- read.csv(taxa_map_name, sep = '\t', header = TRUE, check.names = FALSE)
head(taxa_map_table)
# New columns for taxonomic information
taxa_map_table <- taxa_map_table %>%
  mutate(.row_id = row_number()) %>%
  # Seperate the Taxon column
  separate_rows(Taxon, sep = ";") %>%
  mutate(Taxon = str_trim(Taxon)) %>%
  mutate(
    rank = str_extract(Taxon, "^[dpcfogs]__"),
    value = str_replace(Taxon, "^[dpcfogs]__", ""),
    value = if_else(is.na(value) | value == "", "Unknown", value)
  ) %>%
  # Taxonomy ranks
  filter(rank %in% c("d__", "p__", "c__", "o__", "f__", "g__", "s__")) %>%
  # Wide table
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(.row_id, `Feature ID`, Confidence),
    names_from = rank,
    values_from = value,
    values_fn = dplyr::first
  ) %>%
  # Rename Columns
  rename(
    Domain  = `d__`,
    Phylum  = `p__`,
    Class   = `c__`,
    Order   = `o__`,
    Family  = `f__`,
    Genus   = `g__`,
    Species = `s__`
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(c(Domain, Phylum, Class, Order, Family, Genus, Species),
                ~ if_else(is.na(.x) | .x == "", "Unknown", .x))) %>%
  select(-.row_id)

taxa_map_table[1:5, ]
colnames(taxa_map_table)[1] <- "ASV"
taxa_map_table[1:5, ]



### Read in 16S metadata
metadata_name <- file.path("../../tmp_figures/16S_MaAsLin3_data", "northwood_map.txt")
org_metadata <- read.csv(metadata_name, sep = '\t', header = TRUE)
names(org_metadata)[1] <- "SampleID"
head(org_metadata)

# Remove sample without metadata
measured_samples <- colnames(data_table)
metadata <- org_metadata %>% filter(SampleID %in% measured_samples)
head(metadata)
nrow(metadata)


### Factor the categorical variables in metadata
metadata$Sex <- 
  factor(metadata$Sex, levels = c('Male', 'Female'))

metadata$Location <- 
  factor(metadata$Location, levels = c('Manor', 'Center'))

metadata$FICat <- 
  factor(metadata$FICat, levels = c('3', '4'))

# Check dataframes
data_table[1:5, 1:5]
metadata[1:5, ]





###### Perform MaAsLin3_16S_Analysis
### Add specific level taxonomic annotation to the feature table
# level <- "Phylum"
level <- "Family"
# level <- "Genus"
# level <- "Species"
# level <- "ASV_ID"
# taxa_map_table$ASV_ID <- taxa_map_table$ASV


data_table <- data_table %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "ASV")
nrow(taxa_map_table)
select_taxa_map_table <- taxa_map_table %>% select("ASV", all_of(level)) %>% distinct()
nrow(select_taxa_map_table)
table(select_taxa_map_table[[level]])


anno_data_table <- data_table %>% 
  left_join(select_taxa_map_table, by = "ASV") %>%
  mutate(!!level := if_else(is.na(.data[[level]]) | .data[[level]] == "", "Unknown", .data[[level]]))

### Summarise OTU abundance at specific level
sample_cols <- setdiff(colnames(anno_data_table), c("ASV", level))
sum_anno_data_table <- anno_data_table %>%
  select(all_of(level), all_of(sample_cols)) %>%
  group_by(.data[[level]]) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(sample_cols), ~ sum(as.numeric(.x), na.rm = TRUE)), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(rowSums(across(all_of(sample_cols)))))

sum_anno_data_table

# ### Output family-level taxonomic profilings
# family_level_taxa_file <- file.path("../../tmp_figures/16S_MaAsLin3_data", "16S_Family_Profiling.tsv")
# write.table(sum_anno_data_table, family_level_taxa_file, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE, col.names = TRUE)


### Convert taxa table format for MaAsLin input
sum_df <- as.data.frame(sum_anno_data_table, check.names = FALSE)
rownames(sum_df) <- sum_df[[level]]
sum_df[[level]] <- NULL
final_data_table <- as.data.frame(t(sum_df), check.names = FALSE)
final_data_table[1:5, ]
nrow(final_data_table)

metadata[1:5, ]
nrow(metadata)

final_metadata <- metadata %>%
  mutate(
    Individual = str_extract(SampleID, "^[^-]+")  # 提取到第一个 '-' 之前
  ) %>%
  column_to_rownames("SampleID")
final_metadata[1:5, ]
final_data_table[1:5, ]
ncol(final_data_table)


### Running MaAsLin3
set.seed(1)
fit_out <- maaslin3(input_data = final_data_table,
                    input_metadata = final_metadata,
                    output = 'MaAsLin3_test_output',
                    formula = '~ Sex + Age +
                        TimeNW + FIScore + Location + (1|Individual)',
                    normalization = 'TSS',
                    transform = 'LOG',
                    augment = TRUE,
                    standardize = TRUE,
                    max_significance = 0.1,
                    median_comparison_abundance = TRUE,
                    median_comparison_prevalence = FALSE,
                    max_pngs = 250,
                    cores = 4)


```



### 16S- and MG-based taxonomic Profiling
```{r}
setwd("C:/Users/dlszz/OneDrive - Dalhousie University/Nursing_House_Project/Git_Project/northwood-microbiome/code/MG_analysis")

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(RColorBrewer)

###### Read in Metagenomics-based taxonomic profilings
### MG taxonomic profiling from MetaPhlAn4
MG_tax_file <- file.path("../../data/Metagenomics/MetaPhlAn_taxa", "merged_abundance_table.txt")
df <- read.delim(MG_tax_file, comment.char = "#", check.names = FALSE)

# Column Name Checking
stopifnot("clade_name" %in% colnames(df))
head(df)
nrow(df)

# Keep Family-level Taxa Anno
df_fam <- df %>%
  filter(str_detect(clade_name, "\\|f__")) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(clade_name, "\\|g__"))
nrow(df_fam)

# Extract Family Name
df_fam <- df_fam %>%
  mutate(Family = str_replace(clade_name, ".*\\|f__", "")) %>%
  select(Family, everything(), -clade_name)

head(df_fam)
tail(df_fam)
ncol(df_fam)



###### Read in 16S-based taxonomic profilings
S16_family_taxa_file <- file.path("../../tmp_figures/16S_MaAsLin3_data", "16S_Family_Profiling.tsv")
S16_family_taxa_profile <- read.table(S16_family_taxa_file, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", check.names = FALSE)
head(S16_family_taxa_profile)
S16_samples <- colnames(S16_family_taxa_profile)

### Extract 16S samples with MG data
# Get MG sample names
MG_df_fam <- df_fam
MG_samples <- colnames(MG_df_fam)
MG_samples
MG_samples <- MG_samples[MG_samples != "Family"]
# Convert MG sample names to 16S-style sample IDs
MG_samples_16S_style <- MG_samples %>%
  gsub("_all$", "", .) %>%   # remove trailing "_all"
  gsub("_", "-", .)          # replace "_" with "-"

MG_samples_16S_style

### Select 16S samples that having MG-based profilings
selected_16S_cols <- c("Family", intersect(S16_samples, MG_samples_16S_style))
selected_16S_family_taxa_profile <- S16_family_taxa_profile[, selected_16S_cols]
# Check results
colnames(selected_16S_family_taxa_profile)
dim(selected_16S_family_taxa_profile)


top_n = 15
### Top 15 Families and Other Families in MG samples
# Convert into long table
MG_long_fam <- MG_df_fam %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Family,
    names_to = "Sample",
    values_to = "Abundance"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Abundance = as.numeric(Abundance),
    Abundance = replace_na(Abundance, 0)
  )

# Top families in MG data
MG_top_fam <- MG_long_fam %>%
  group_by(Family) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(total)) %>%
  slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
  pull(Family)

# Combine left families into Other taxa
MG_plot_df <- MG_long_fam  %>%
  mutate(Family_plot = if_else(Family %in% MG_top_fam, Family, "Other_taxa")) %>%
  group_by(Sample, Family_plot) %>%
  summarise(Abundance = sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

head(MG_plot_df)
# Convert MG sample names to 16S-style sample IDs
MG_plot_df <- MG_plot_df %>%
  mutate(
    Sample = Sample %>%
      gsub("_all$", "", .) %>%
      gsub("_", "-", .)
  )

head(MG_plot_df)
tail(MG_plot_df)




### Top 15 Families and Other Families in 16S samples
head(selected_16S_family_taxa_profile)

# Convert into long table
S16_long_fam <- selected_16S_family_taxa_profile %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Family,
    names_to = "Sample",
    values_to = "Abundance"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Abundance = as.numeric(Abundance),
    Abundance = replace_na(Abundance, 0)
  )

# Calculate family relative abundance in the samples
S16_long_fam <- S16_long_fam %>%
  group_by(Sample) %>%
  mutate(Rel_Abundance = Abundance / sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Top families in 16S data
S16_top_fam <- S16_long_fam %>%
  group_by(Family) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(Rel_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(total)) %>%
  slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
  pull(Family)
S16_top_fam

# Combine left families into Other taxa
S16_plot_df <- S16_long_fam  %>%
  mutate(Family_plot = if_else(Family %in% S16_top_fam, Family, "Other_taxa")) %>%
  group_by(Sample, Family_plot) %>%
  summarise(Abundance = sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE), Rel_Abundance = sum(Rel_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

head(S16_plot_df)


### Get the name of Top Families in both MG and 16S
top_fam_union <- union(MG_top_fam, S16_top_fam)


###### Regenerate 16S and MG tables
### MG tables
# Convert into long table
update_MG_long_fam <- MG_df_fam %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Family,
    names_to = "Sample",
    values_to = "Abundance"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Abundance = as.numeric(Abundance),
    Abundance = replace_na(Abundance, 0)
  )
# Combine left families into Other taxa
update_MG_plot_df <- update_MG_long_fam  %>%
  mutate(Family_plot = if_else(Family %in% top_fam_union, Family, "Other_taxa")) %>%
  group_by(Sample, Family_plot) %>%
  summarise(Abundance = sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

### S16 tables
# Convert into long table
update_S16_long_fam <- selected_16S_family_taxa_profile %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Family,
    names_to = "Sample",
    values_to = "Abundance"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Abundance = as.numeric(Abundance),
    Abundance = replace_na(Abundance, 0)
  )

update_S16_long_fam <- update_S16_long_fam %>%
  group_by(Sample) %>%
  mutate(Rel_Abundance = Abundance / sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Combine left families into Other taxa
update_S16_plot_df <- update_S16_long_fam  %>%
  mutate(Family_plot = if_else(Family %in% top_fam_union, Family, "Other_taxa")) %>%
  group_by(Sample, Family_plot) %>%
  summarise(
    Abundance = sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    Rel_Abundance = sum(Rel_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

head(update_S16_plot_df)
### Calculate relative abundance


###### Barplots
### Using a same color set for both 16S data and MG data
all_taxa <- unique(c(sort(unique(top_fam_union)), "Other_taxa"))
pal <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(12, "Set3"))(length(all_taxa))
names(pal) <- all_taxa
# Reorder palette to match all_taxa order
pal <- pal[all_taxa]
pal["Other_taxa"] <- "grey70"   # force grey (safe even if already grey)

# Fix Taxon order (optional but recommended)
update_MG_plot_df <- update_MG_plot_df %>%
  mutate(Family_plot = factor(Family_plot, levels = all_taxa))
update_S16_plot_df <- update_S16_plot_df %>%
  mutate(Family_plot = factor(Family_plot, levels = all_taxa))


### Plot (MG)
update_MG_plot_df <- update_MG_plot_df %>% mutate(Sample = Sample %>%
      gsub("_all$", "", .) %>%
      gsub("_", "-", .))

p_MG <- ggplot(update_MG_plot_df, aes(x = Sample, y = Abundance, fill = Family_plot)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal) +
  labs(x = "Sample", y = "Relative abundance (%)", fill = "Family") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 75, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )
print(p_MG)

# figure_file <- file.path("../../figures/", "recolored_MG_based_family_level_tax_profile.jpg")
# ggsave(figure_file, p_MG, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)

### Plot (16S)
p_S16 <- ggplot(update_S16_plot_df, aes(x = Sample, y = Rel_Abundance*100, fill = Family_plot)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal) +
  labs(x = "Sample", y = "Relative abundance (%)", fill = "Family") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 75, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )
print(p_S16)

# figure_file <- file.path("../../figures/", "recolored_S16_based_family_level_tax_profile.jpg")
# ggsave(figure_file, p_S16, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)



###### 16S and MG Grouped Plots
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

### Make sure MG sample names match 16S style
update_MG_plot_df <- update_MG_plot_df %>%
  mutate(
    Sample = Sample %>%
      gsub("_all$", "", .) %>%
      gsub("_", "-", .)
  )

### If MG already has relative abundance in percent, rename it clearly;
### otherwise replace MG_abundance_pct with the correct relative abundance column
MG_plot_ready <- update_MG_plot_df %>%
  mutate(
    Method = "Metagenomics",
    Abundance_pct = Abundance   # 推荐这样；如果你现在只有百分比原值，再相应替换
  ) %>%
  select(Sample, Family_plot, Method, Abundance_pct)

S16_plot_ready <- update_S16_plot_df %>%
  mutate(
    Method = "16S rRNA",
    Abundance_pct = Rel_Abundance * 100
  ) %>%
  select(Sample, Family_plot, Method, Abundance_pct)

### Combine two tables
plot_df <- bind_rows(MG_plot_ready, S16_plot_ready)

### Fix sample order
sample_order <- sort(unique(plot_df$Sample))
plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  mutate(
    Sample = factor(Sample, levels = sample_order),
    Method = factor(Method, levels = c("16S rRNA", "Metagenomics")),
    Family_plot = factor(Family_plot, levels = all_taxa)
  )

### Combined plot
p_combined <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Sample, y = Abundance_pct, fill = Family_plot)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~ Method, ncol = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal) +
  labs(x = "Sample", y = "Relative abundance (%)", fill = "Family") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 75, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

print(p_combined)

figure_file <- file.path("../../tmp_figures/", "recolored_S16_MG_family_level_tax_profile.jpg")
ggsave(figure_file, p_combined, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```



### 16S Taxonomic Profiling for All Samples
```{r}
###### Read in 16S-based taxonomic profilings
S16_family_taxa_file <- file.path("../../tmp_figures/16S_MaAsLin3_data", "16S_Family_Profiling.tsv")
S16_family_taxa_profile <- read.table(S16_family_taxa_file, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", check.names = FALSE)
head(S16_family_taxa_profile)

colnames(S16_family_taxa_profile)
head(S16_family_taxa_profile)


### Assign top taxa (From the Previous Section)
top_fam_union

# Convert into long table
all_S16_long_fam <- S16_family_taxa_profile %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Family,
    names_to = "Sample",
    values_to = "Abundance"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Abundance = as.numeric(Abundance),
    Abundance = replace_na(Abundance, 0)
  )

# Calculate family relative abundance in the samples
all_S16_long_fam <- all_S16_long_fam %>%
  group_by(Sample) %>%
  mutate(Rel_Abundance = Abundance / sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()


# Combine left families into Other taxa
all_S16_plot_df <- all_S16_long_fam  %>%
  mutate(Family_plot = if_else(Family %in% top_fam_union, Family, "Other_taxa")) %>%
  group_by(Sample, Family_plot) %>%
  summarise(Abundance = sum(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE), Rel_Abundance = sum(Rel_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

head(all_S16_plot_df)

all_S16_plot_df <- all_S16_plot_df %>%
  mutate(Individual = str_extract(Sample, "^[^-]+"))


### Combined plot
S16_all_plot <- ggplot(all_S16_plot_df, aes(x = Sample, y = Rel_Abundance, fill = Family_plot)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~ Method, ncol = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal) +
  labs(x = "Sample", y = "Relative abundance (%)", fill = "Family") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 75, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

print(S16_all_plot)


all_S16_plot_df2 <- all_S16_plot_df %>%
  mutate(
    Sample_num = as.integer(str_extract(Sample, "(?<=-).+$"))  # 提取 '-' 后面的数字
  ) %>%
  arrange(Individual, Sample_num) %>%
  mutate(
    # 让 x 轴按我们排好的顺序显示（全局顺序：按 Individual，再按编号）
    Sample = factor(Sample, levels = unique(Sample))
  )


library(ggplot2)

n_per_page <- 8   # 改成 8 或 10
out_dir <- "../../tmp_figures/16S_Plot"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# 1)（可选）让 Sample 在每个 Individual 内按编号排序，避免 NW001-10 排在 NW001-2 前面
plot_df <- all_S16_plot_df %>%
  mutate(
    Sample_num = as.integer(str_extract(Sample, "(?<=-)\\d+$"))
  ) %>%
  arrange(Individual, Sample_num) %>%
  mutate(Sample = factor(Sample, levels = unique(Sample)))

# 2) 给 Individual 分页编号：每 n_per_page 个为一组
ind_levels <- sort(unique(plot_df$Individual))
ind_page_map <- tibble(
  Individual = ind_levels,
  Page = ceiling(seq_along(ind_levels) / n_per_page)
)

plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  left_join(ind_page_map, by = "Individual")

n_pages <- max(plot_df$Page)

# 3) 循环画图 + 保存
for (pg in seq_len(n_pages)) {
  df_pg <- plot_df %>% filter(Page == pg)

  p <- ggplot(df_pg, aes(x = Sample, y = Rel_Abundance*100, fill = Family_plot)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.9) +
    facet_wrap(~ Individual, ncol = 4, scales = "free_x") +  # ncol可调，比如 2/3/4
    scale_fill_manual(values = pal) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Taxonomic profiling (Individuals ", (pg-1)*n_per_page + 1, "–", min(pg*n_per_page, length(ind_levels)), ")"),
      x = "Sample", y = "Relative abundance (%)", fill = "Family"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 75, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "right"
    )

  print(p)

  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(out_dir, sprintf("S16_tax_profile_page_%02d.jpg", pg)),
    plot = p, width = 14, height = 8, dpi = 300
  )
}

```



Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
